_rule: THE NARRATOR VOICE IS THE SERIES' FACE — never change mid-season. Archive every episode's WAV. Recast window closes once EP1 is posted.
name: George - Warm, Captivating Storyteller

casting.method: 4 male middle_aged candidates x eleven_v3 Thai sample -> Scribe v2 round-trip QA (voice-design API unavailable on this plan)
casting.result: george only candidate to render proper noun เสี่ยหมง exactly; adam/daniel -> เสี่ยหงส์, brian -> เสี่ยหม่อง; pacing 2.9 Thai words/s fits 70-word VO in ~24s
casting.samples: tools/04-serial-drama/casting/sample-*.mp3 (keep for พี่แบงค์ veto before EP1 posts)

notes: eleven_v3 supports inline audio tags for drama delivery: [whispers] [sighs] [pause] etc. Use sparingly in vo-script.txt.
